title: Support class:: constant function references in elaboration

features.name: parameterized virtual class with static function
features.description: Code should include a parameterized virtual class that contains a static function

features.name: scope resolution operator for static function call on parameterized class
features.description: Code should include calling a static function using :: scope resolution operator on a parameterized class

features.name: static function call result in localparam elaboration
features.description: Code should include a localparam assignment that calls a static function via class scope resolution
